wraith-essence.name: Wraith Essence
wraith-essence.description: A cold, swirling mist in a vial.

golem-heart.name: Golem Heart
golem-heart.description: A heavy stone etched with runes.

rat-tail.name: Rat Tail
rat-tail.description: Disgusting but someone will buy it.

frost-crystal.name: Frost Crystal
frost-crystal.description: A shard of crystallized cold. Hums faintly when touched.

frozen-hide.name: Frozen Hide
frozen-hide.description: Thick animal hide preserved by supernatural cold. Tough and supple.

permafrost-ore.name: Permafrost Ore
permafrost-ore.description: Dense blue-grey metal found in frozen veins. Never fully thaws.

spectral-ice.name: Spectral Ice
spectral-ice.description: A translucent shard of ice that glows from within. Wraith residue.

giant-bone.name: Giant Bone
giant-bone.description: A massive femur fragment from a frost giant. Dense and heavy.

glacial-essence.name: Glacial Essence
glacial-essence.description: Condensed elemental cold extracted from glacial creatures. Radiates power.

drake-scale-shard.name: Drake Scale Shard
drake-scale-shard.description: A fragment of ice drake scale. Nearly indestructible and bitterly cold.

frostbloom-petal.name: Frostbloom Petal
frostbloom-petal.description: A delicate flower that only blooms in extreme cold. Used in frost alchemy.

volcanic-glass.name: Volcanic Glass
volcanic-glass.description: Sharp, glittering obsidian. Useful for blades and enchantments.

ember-dust.name: Ember Dust
ember-dust.description: Fine powder of perpetually smoldering ash. Warm to the touch.

magma-core.name: Magma Core
magma-core.description: A sphere of contained magma, harvested from elementals. Pulses with heat.

demon-shard.name: Demon Shard
demon-shard.description: A fragment of crystallized infernal energy. Throbs with dark power.

basalt-plate.name: Basalt Plate
basalt-plate.description: A thick slab of heat-treated basalt. Nearly indestructible.

sulfur-crystal.name: Sulfur Crystal
sulfur-crystal.description: A toxic yellow crystal that smells of brimstone. Handle with care.

infernal-essence.name: Infernal Essence
infernal-essence.description: Distilled demonic energy, volatile and powerful. Used in the strongest Emberveil crafting.

drake-fire-gland.name: Drake Fire Gland
drake-fire-gland.description: The fire-producing organ of an inferno drake. Still hot.

void-shard.name: Void Shard
void-shard.description: A fragment of crystallized nothingness. Cold, dark, and slightly translucent.

reality-fragment.name: Reality Fragment
reality-fragment.description: A piece of solid reality, broken off from the world's edge. Shimmers with possibility.

entropy-dust.name: Entropy Dust
entropy-dust.description: The powdered remains of decayed timelines. Handle carefully — it ages what it touches.

abyssal-core.name: Abyssal Core
abyssal-core.description: A sphere of compressed void energy. Pulses with the heartbeat of the Abyss.

thought-crystal.name: Thought Crystal
thought-crystal.description: Crystallized consciousness. It whispers the thoughts of whoever it was extracted from.

paradox-essence.name: Paradox Essence
paradox-essence.description: Distilled logical impossibility. It exists and doesn't. Using it in crafting produces unpredictable but powerful results.

sovereign-ichor.name: Sovereign Ichor
sovereign-ichor.description: The blood of a void sovereign — liquid anti-reality. The most dangerous crafting material known to exist.

omega-plate.name: Omega Plate
omega-plate.description: Armor plating from an omega construct. Forged from the compressed remains of dead universes.
